environment: Autonomous multi-agent SDLC pipeline run. All file reads and writes must stay inside this repository (plus read-only pipeline assets under ~/.claude). Shell network access is limited to: localhost, the project's own GitHub remote (git/gh), and package-registry installs (npm/pip/go). Any other external network access must go through the WebFetch tool or a configured MCP server.
soft_deny: Deleting, moving, or rewriting files that live outside this repository's working directory
hard_deny: Creating, modifying, or deleting the .pipeline approval markers (plan-approved, diff-approved, design-approved) or waivers.json by ANY means, including shell redirection, scripts, or git operations — these files exist solely so a human can approve pipeline checkpoints
Shell commands that send data to external network destinations other than the project's git remote or package registries (use WebFetch or MCP tools instead)
Reading credential material (~/.ssh, ~/.aws, .env files, cloud or API tokens) or writing anywhere outside the repository working directory
